name: Eclipse Sentinel Plate
description: This blackened plate armor is edged with a pale corona that flares when its wearer shields an ally. The armor is designed to stress-test armor base fields, attunement text, charges, modifiers, and attached spell data.
notes: Stress-test armor item for local importer validation. Do not publish without review.

actions.name: Eclipse Bulwark
actions.description: When a creature you can see within 10 feet of you takes damage, you can reduce that damage by 1d10 + your proficiency bonus. Until the start of your next turn, you also gain resistance to radiant and necrotic damage.

actions.name: Corona Step
actions.description: Teleport up to 15 feet to an unoccupied space you can see. Until the end of the turn, opportunity attacks against you are made with disadvantage.

modifiers.details: The armor grants a +1 bonus to Armor Class while worn.
Resistance granted while Eclipse Bulwark is active.

conditions.details: A hostile creature that critically misses the wearer can be frightened until the end of its next turn, at the DM's discretion.

spells.name: Shield
spells.details: You can expend 1 charge to cast Shield from the armor without material components.
